title: just learned that a mentor, Dennis Bushnell, the longest serving Chief Scientist at NASA (Chief for 28 years) died. in his remembrance I wanna share one of his only public presentations, which might be the greatest NASA slide decks of all time (circa 2001) https://alachuacounty.us/Depts/epd/EPAC/Future%20Strategic%20Issues%20-%20Future%20Warfare%20Circa%202025%20-%20NASA.pdf
